title: Why do tasks appear in My week without date?
excerpt:
Hi, 
I love to use My Week, but I was missing tasks. Found out the there are a lot of tasks, coming from different boards are labeled as ’ without a date’ while having a date.  And other tasks, from that some board do go…

posts.author: Mieke (Mieke Jochemsen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I love to use My Week, but I was missing tasks. Found out the there are a lot of tasks, coming from different boards are labeled as ’ without a date’ while having a date. And other tasks, from that some board do go to correct week.
Is there a solution to get the tasks to the correct week in My Week?

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Mieke

We’ve actually replaced My Week with the new My Work feature!

At the moment, there is no way to exclude or hide items without a date from My Work - if you have items that are reaching their limit b/c of this, you would need to hide the board they are coming from.

There is currently a limit of 1000 items that can be pulled into My Work at one time, but we are actively working on expanding this limit, so stay tuned!

If you ever feel that you are experiencing any issues with My Work, son’t hesitate to contact support@monday.com and out Support Team can assist you accordingly

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
